name: hivelore-monorepo
description: Hivelore - the deterministic policy gate for agent-written code (rules live as repo-native team memory)

scripts.verify: pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm check:artifacts && node packages/cli/dist/index.js eval --regression-gate --fail-under 80 --fail-under-catch-rate 100
scripts.publish:all: pnpm verify && pnpm --filter @hivelore/core publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @hivelore/embeddings publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @hivelore/mcp publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @hivelore/cli publish --access public --no-git-checks
